name: MSI B560M PRO-VDH Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Supports DDR4-5066(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 10Gbps Type-A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.0b - VGA - 2.5G LAN (B560MPVDH)
shortName: MSI B560M PRO-VDH Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Supports
description: Mid-range Micro ATX motherboard for Intel 10th/11th gen with B560 chipset and PCIe 4.0 M.2 support.
